mcp.baseUrl.label: GrokSearch MCP Base URL
mcp.baseUrl.help: Base URL for the remote GrokSearch deployment. /mcp is derived automatically when mcp.url is unset.

mcp.url.label: GrokSearch MCP URL
mcp.url.help: Explicit remote MCP URL override when the endpoint is not served at /mcp.

mcp.healthUrl.label: GrokSearch Health URL
mcp.healthUrl.help: Optional health URL override. Leave empty if the remote deployment does not expose /health publicly.

mcp.bearerToken.label: GrokSearch Bearer Token
mcp.bearerToken.help: Bearer token for the remote GrokSearch MCP endpoint. Supports SecretRef objects.

mcp.httpUserAgent.label: HTTP User-Agent
mcp.httpUserAgent.help: Optional User-Agent override for MCP probe and tool calls.

mcp.toolTimeoutSeconds.label: Tool Timeout Seconds
mcp.toolTimeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for remote MCP tool calls.

mcp.verifyTimeoutSeconds.label: Verify Timeout Seconds
mcp.verifyTimeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for MCP probe and health verification requests.

defaults.search.platform.label: Default Search Platform
defaults.search.platform.help: Optional default platform hint for GrokSearch search requests.

defaults.search.model.label: Default Search Model
defaults.search.model.help: Optional default Grok model override for GrokSearch search requests.

defaults.search.extraSources.label: Default Extra Sources
defaults.search.extraSources.help: Default extra source fan-out for GrokSearch search requests.

defaults.map.maxDepth.label: Default Map Max Depth
defaults.map.maxDepth.help: Default maximum crawl depth for groksearch_map.

defaults.map.maxBreadth.label: Default Map Max Breadth
defaults.map.maxBreadth.help: Default breadth per level for groksearch_map.

defaults.research.extraSources.label: Default Research Extra Sources
defaults.research.extraSources.help: Default extra source fan-out for groksearch_research.
